scope: Frontend-only marker concentration symbology for existing Development Hotspots layer.

marker_size_logic.basis: Count of permits for the actively selected permit segment.
marker_size_logic.size_curve: Continuous capped sizing inside each tier so high-count parcels no longer collapse into identical dots.
marker_size_logic.visual_emphasis: Each marker now includes a translucent same-color halo sized from selected-segment concentration plus a capped primary icon.
marker_size_logic.guardrail: Maximum icon size is capped to avoid covering the parcel map.

legend_updates.message: Size = number/intensity of the selected permit segment.

heatmap_mode.reason: Deferred to avoid replacing the existing SceneView marker layer with a different renderer path. Sized markers now provide the requested concentration behavior safely.

validation.npm_run_build_webpack: passed after retry; initial validation run timed out and left a transient Next build lock
